title: Sqlitelogictest - Aggregation query on empty table with DISTINCT clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(pk INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, col_a INTEGER, col_b REAL, col_c TEXT, col_d INTEGER, col_e REAL, col_f TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_table(col_a, col_b, col_c, col_d, col_e, col_f) VALUES (NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL);
SELECT MIN(col_b) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT col_b FROM test_table WHERE col_a IS NULL);
CREATE TABLE another_table(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value REAL, description TEXT);
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT value) FROM another_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Aggregation query on empty table with DISTINCT clause
